creator: ronald@revlink.ph
text:
install php5-pgsql from ports then restart apache by reboot or apachectl restart
then tail -f /var/log/message which yields to

Apr 13 16:34:48 ftp kernel: pid 91592 (httpd), uid 0: exited on signal 11 (core dumped)

Fix: 

disabling pgsql.so extensions will do the trick
How-To-Repeat: install php5-pgsql from ports then restart apache by reboot or apachectl restart
then tail -f /var/log/message which yields to
